weight_loss.title: Ultimate Shred & Tone
weight_loss.description: A high-intensity plan focused on maximizing caloric burn, improving cardiovascular health, and preserving lean muscle mass.

tips: Drink at least 3-4 liters of water daily.
Eat a lean protein source with every meal.

workout.details: 45 mins of High-Intensity Interval Training. 40s work, 20s rest. (Kettlebell swings, burpees, mountain climbers).
Push-ups (3x15), Dumbbell Rows (3x12), Shoulder Press (3x12), Planks (3x60s).
45 mins of light cardio (brisk walking, cycling, or swimming).
Squats (4x12), Lunges (3x15 per leg), Leg Press (3x12), Calf Raises (4x20).
30 mins treadmill (incline walking) + 15 mins stairmaster.
3 rounds: Deadlifts (10), Bench Press (10), Pull-ups (max), Box Jumps (15).
Complete rest. 15 mins of deep stretching or yoga.

muscle_gain.title: Titan Muscle Builder
muscle_gain.description: A hypertrophy-focused split designed to pack on lean muscle mass through progressive overload and high protein intake.

diet.protein: Very High (1.5g per lb of bodyweight)
tips: Ensure you are in a caloric surplus.
Consume a protein shake within 30 minutes post-workout.
Get 7-8 hours of sleep for optimal recovery.

workout.details: Bench Press (4x8-10), Incline DB Press (3x10), Cable Crossovers (3x12), Tricep Pushdowns (4x12), Skull Crushers (3x10).
Deadlifts (4x6-8), Barbell Rows (3x10), Lat Pulldowns (3x12), Barbell Curls (4x10), Hammer Curls (3x12).
Rest day. Focus on eating and hydration.
Overhead Press (4x8), Lateral Raises (4x15), Front Raises (3x12), Face Pulls (3x15), Cable Crunches (4x15).
Squats (4x8), Leg Press (3x10), Leg Extensions (4x15), Calf Raises (5x20).
Romanian Deadlifts (4x10), Lying Leg Curls (4x12), Walking Lunges (3x12 per leg).
Complete rest day.

general.title: Healthy & Active Lifestyle
general.description: A balanced routine combining strength and cardiovascular health for overall longevity and fitness.

tips: Incorporate fruits and vegetables into every meal.
Limit added sugars and trans fats.

workout.details: Push-ups/Bench Press (3x10), Shoulder Press (3x10), Tricep Extensions (3x12).
30 mins of moderate-intensity cardio (jogging, cycling).
Lat Pulldowns (3x10), Seated Rows (3x12), Bicep Curls (3x12).
Active recovery or rest.
Goblet Squats (3x12), Lunges (3x10/leg), Planks (3x60s).
Play a sport, go hiking, or do a light full-body machine circuit.
Rest and prepare for the week ahead.
